listing_facts.model_or_name: Vintage black leather jacket with zipper
photo_observations: Black genuine-look leather full-zip jacket on a hanger at what looks like a thrift/market rack
Kenneth Cole interior brand tag visible at the collar
Two front flap/welt pockets, point collar, single silver front zipper
Some surface creasing/sheen and minor wear typical of a vintage leather jacket; no obvious tears visible
Only one main photo readable here; dots indicate ~5 photos exist but additional angles/measurements not shown

price_read.reasoning: Kenneth Cole leather/faux-leather jackets retail roughly $80-$200 new (genuine leather styles toward the higher end; the Reaction line and faux versions ~$50-$75). Used comps on eBay for Kenneth Cole leather jackets cluster heavily in the under-$40 to ~$60 range, with vintage pieces often $25-$60. At $12 with free shipping this is well below both new and typical used prices — a clear steal IF it actually fits and the leather is in the stated 'excellent' shape. The $8 offer button is worth a try, but at $12 the savings are already strong enough that haggling hard isn't necessary. Note: 'retail' here is a general estimate for the category, not this exact vintage SKU.

missing_info: No measurements at all — pit-to-pit, length, sleeve, shoulder. 'Size L' on a vintage jacket is unreliable and fit is a real gamble
No close-ups in this view of the lining, zipper pull, cuffs, or any damage areas
Material not explicitly stated as genuine leather vs faux — important for a 'leather' jacket
Photographed on a crowded rack rather than clear flat-lay/worn shots
concerns: Vintage sizing runs differently than modern L; without numbers you can't confirm fit
'Excellent condition' is the seller's word — leather can have cracking, peeling, or lining tears not visible here
Shot at a market/thrift setting, so this may be a quick resale flip with limited detail provided
questions_to_ask: Can you share the measurements laid flat — pit-to-pit, total length, and sleeve length?
Is this genuine leather or faux/bonded leather?
Are there any cracks, peeling, stains, or tears in the leather or lining? Close-up photos please.
Does the zipper run smoothly the full length?

verdict.one_line: At $12 shipped this is well under used and new prices — a steal, so grab it, but message for pit-to-pit measurements first since fit is the only real risk.
verdict.user_context: I am checking whether this jacket is worth buying; price and fit matter, and authenticity should only be flagged for meaningfully fakeable brands.
